name: @vito_liu93/kelp-agent
description: Personal TUI agent built with Bun + Claude Messages API

scripts.build:localbin: bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile dist/kelp && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && ln -sf "$PWD/dist/kelp" "$HOME/.local/bin/kelp"
scripts.publish: bun run build:bin && npm publish --access public
